author: bsunanda
body:
#### PR description:

Correct a bug in HGCalGeomParameters.cc to make it work correctly for the ColdBox mode of HGCal Backport from #51324

#### PR validation:

Tested in CMSSW version 20_1_X

#### If this PR is a backport please specify the original PR and why you need to backport that PR. If this PR will be backported please specify to which release cycle the backport is meant for:

Backport from #51324
title: Phase2-hgx367L Correct a bug in HGCalGeomParameters.cc to make it work correctly for the ColdBox mode of HGCal Backport from #51324
